creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption: NYC is getting a NEW Transit System 📍The Interborough Express #nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: New York City is finally getting a new transit system, and here's everything you need to know. This is called the Interboro Express and will be a light rail system which rides parallel with roads and sometimes will be sharing the street with cars. The IBX is going to connect the outer bits of Brooklyn and Queens, tethering 17 different subway lines and the Long Island Railroad in just about 40 minutes. Let me know what you think about this in the comments and follow for more New York City tours.
